name: hoc/stepper
description: A multi-step wizard HOC that guides users through a linear sequence of stages with step indicators, labels, navigation buttons, and completion badges. Provides Stepper, StepperStep, StepperHeader, StepperContent, StepperNavigation, StepperPrevious, StepperNext, and StepperFinish primitives with optional step validation, disabled-state guards, and progress-bar integration. Composed of Button, Progress, and Badge with full i18n support via ConfigProvider.
useCases: Account-setup wizards collecting profile, company, team, and billing information in stages
Checkout flows segmented into Cart, Shipping, Payment, and Confirmation steps
Form-heavy onboarding processes such as medical intake or insurance quote applications
Multi-step content-creation wizards for blog posts, courses, or product listings with validation
usage: import { Stepper, StepperStep, StepperHeader, StepperContent, StepperNavigation } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/stepper"
